label: Order Book
description: Live bid/ask ladder with depth bars, spread display, and price level aggregation for the active instrument.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx.

0.6.note: isLoading guard renders loading spinner via TerminalData context.

0.7.note: bids.length===0 && asks.length===0 guard renders 'No order book data'.

0.8.note: error guard renders rose-400 error text.

0.9.note: No dead code. Delegates rendering to shared OrderBook component.

l0.notes: All L0 checks pass. Clean minimal widget.

1.1.note: Data exclusively via useTerminalData(); bids/asks/livePrice/spread/spreadBps all from context.

1.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); orderbookApiData sourced from useOrderBook() with mode/asOf params from scope.

1.3.note: Order book is instrument-level L2 market data; no org filtering applies.

1.5.note: Strategy filter does not affect the order book.

1.6.note: Empty scope shows full market order book (correct for market data).

1.7.note: No reference data in widget; mock generation in lib/mocks/generators/order-book.ts (correct, used by context not widget).

l1.notes: L1 pass. 1.3/1.4/1.5/1.6 N/A — pure market data widget not filtered by org/client/strategy scope.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ (real-time WS + REST), batch ✓ (useOrderBook passes asOf param for historical snapshot), paper N/A.

3.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts reads context.mode, passes modeParam/asOfParam to useOrderBook(). Batch mode delivers historical snapshot.

3.5.note: Paper mode expected: same as live (read-only market data view). No behavioral change needed.

3.6.note: WebSocket for price updates disabled when context.mode!=='live' (useWebSocket enabled:context.mode==='live'). Order book mock tick interval (500ms) runs only in mock-data mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 required (order book is read-only, 3.3 may be N/A; batch indicator check 3.4).

4.1.note: No buttons in this widget — pure display component delegating to OrderBook.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: All agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3(N/A—no form)/4.4(N/A—no submit)/4.7(N/A—no tabs)/4.8(scroll within OrderBook component) required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all — order book is market data shared by all strategy types. No strategy-specific logic.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 follows L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded colors in widget file. CLEAN.

7.4.note: OrderBookWidget PascalCase, useTerminalData useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget file. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. All mechanical checks clean.

8.1.note: No text-[…] arbitrary sizes in this file. CLEAN.

8.3.note: Delegates to shared OrderBook trading component — appropriate. No custom div+tailwind replacements needed.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no input, no interactive div without role. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass on OrderBook component required.

8.5.note: Human check required — responsive at minW=2, minH=2.

l8.notes: 8.1–8.3 pass. 8.4 agent portion clean. Human 8.4+8.5 required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Order book is a distinct view from price chart and trades — independent sizing and layout in the terminal preset. Merging would eliminate resizability.

relationships.notes: Driven by selectedInstrument from instrument-bar via TerminalDataContext. Renders the shared OrderBook trading component.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/generators/order-book.ts (generateMockOrderBook — consumed by use-terminal-page-data.ts, not directly by widget)
dataContract.notes: Bid/ask data ticks with 500ms mock sim in dev; production path: WS for top-of-book updates + REST snapshot via useOrderBook(). Historical (batch) mode uses asOf REST snapshot.

gaps: Options and vol surface instruments may have different LOB structure
DeFi on-chain orderbooks (e.g. dYdX) not verified
coverage.notes: Venue-agnostic at the widget level — underlying OrderBook component handles normalization.

knownIssues: In mock-data mode bids/asks are never truly empty so the empty guard (0.7) is effectively untestable without real API returning no data

findings.description: order-book-widget.tsx — 'No order book data', 'Loading...' user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
